class PenalizedModel:
    def __init__(self, A, B, C, u_min, u_max, k, penalty=100.0):
        self.A = A
        self.B = B
        self.C = C
        self.k = k
        self.M0 = penalty
        self.m = len(B)
        self.penalty_growth = 0.1
        self.A_min = (1 - k) * A
